tree.name: Bogdan Bogdanovic
tree.tradeDescription: Traded from Hawks with a 2025 2nd round draft pick (Mohamed Diawara, MIN own) for Terance Mann and Bones Hyland

assetsGivenUp.name: Terance Mann
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted by Clippers 48th overall in the 2019 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Bones Hyland
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: LAC sent 2024 2nd (LAC own, became Bronny James) and 2025 2nd (LAC own, became John Tonje) to LAL; DEN sent Bones Hyland to LAC; DEN sent Davon Reed to LAL; LAL sent Thomas Bryant to DEN; LAL sent Patrick Beverley and cash to ORL; ORL sent Mo Bamba to LAL

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#55)
assetsGivenUp.note: Clippers' own 2nd round pick, sent to Lakers in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#45)
assetsGivenUp.note: Clippers' own 2nd round pick, sent to Lakers in 4-team trade
